name: Shaun MacGillivray
introduction: Shaun has produced the award- winning giant-screen films Journey to The South Pacific, To The Arctic, Grand Canyon Adventure, Humpback Whales, National Parks Adventure, We, the Marines, Dream Big, America’s Musical Journey, and Into America’s Wild and is currently in production on Ireland.Shaun leads the company’s Business Development and Partnership team and has successfully raised more than  $40 million in funding for IMAX educational films in the last few years. Shaun received an MFA degree in Film Production from the University of Southern California. He and his wife Katie live in Laguna Beach with their three children.
